stemHtml:
A gaseous loop fire detector uses the following principle:
An increase in surrounding temperature will…

options.a: Decrease the pressure inside a gas-filled tube. When reaching the lower threshold, the gas-filled tube collapses and pressure switch will activate the alarm.
options.b: Increase the temperature inside a gas-filled tube, which narrows the volume of the tube. The alarm is activated when the tube collapses.
options.c: Increase the temperature inside a gas-filled tube, which expands the volume of the tube. The alarm is activated when the tube breaks.
options.d: Increase the pressure inside a gas-filled tube. When reaching the upper threshold, a pressure switch will activate the alarm.
